name: TechnoSTIM
description: Portable electrical stimulation therapy device for a convenient mock rehabilitation setup.

name: Quadruped Cane
description: Four-point support cane designed to provide additional balance and stability.

name: Wheelchair
description: Foldable wheelchair for everyday mobility support.

name: Forearm Crutches
description: Adjustable forearm crutches for assisted walking and rehabilitation.

name: Water Bottle 1L
description: One-litre reusable bottle for hydration during therapy and exercise.

name: Therapeutic Tape
description: Flexible therapeutic tape for mock support and recovery use.

name: Vestibular Ball
description: Exercise ball available in multiple sizes for balance and mobility activities.

name: Dumbbells
description: Compact dumbbells for strength and rehabilitation exercises.

name: Compression Socks
description: Compression socks intended for comfort and everyday recovery support.

name: Consultation
description: Appointment flow for choosing a physical therapy consultation type and requesting a preferred schedule.

name: Telehealth Services
description: Appointment flow for guided therapy check-ins and follow-up support through telehealth.

name: Home Care Services
description: Appointment flow for therapy support delivered in the patient's home setting.
